contactTitle: Didn't find what you're looking for?
contactDescription: Contact us directly for support on any topic.

whatIsBizcarder.a: BizCarder is a modern CRM platform that helps you digitize physical business cards, manage your contact network, and track professional relationships.

howToInstall.q: How do I install the app? (PWA)
howToInstall.a: BizCarder is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can install it by clicking the 'Install' icon in your browser's address bar or using the 'Add to Home Screen' option on mobile.

howToAddCard.q: How do I add a new business card?
howToAddCard.a: Click the 'Add New Card' button on the Contacts page. You can scan the card with your camera or enter information manually. AI-powered OCR automatically detects information on the card.

howToExport.q: How do I export business cards?
howToExport.a: Export options in Excel, PDF, and vCard formats are available at the top right of the Cards page. You can select multiple cards for bulk export.

howToShare.q: How do I share my digital business card?
howToShare.a: Go to the 'My Card' tab to create or edit your personal digital business card. Share via QR code, link sharing, or vCard download.

whatIsVcard.a: vCard is a standard file format (.vcf) containing contact information. It can be directly added to phone contacts and works across all platforms.

howReminders.a: When editing a card, you can set a date in the 'Follow-up Reminder' field. A reminder notification will appear on the dashboard when the date arrives.

howToLogNotes.q: How do I log meeting notes?
howToLogNotes.a: Each card's detail view has an 'Activity & Notes' section. You can add calls, meetings, emails, or general notes and track the history.

offlineUsage.a: The app has offline capabilities. Previously loaded data is displayed, and newly added cards are automatically synced when the internet connection is restored.

dataSecurity.a: All your data is protected with modern encryption standards. Corporate SSO/SAML support, role-based access control, and secure session management provide maximum security.

howToBackup.q: How do I backup the database?
howToBackup.a: Run this command: docker compose exec backend bash scripts/backup.sh — This creates a compressed database dump and uploads archive. Last 7 backups are kept automatically.

howToRestore.q: How do I restore from a backup?
howToRestore.a: First list available backups: docker compose exec backend bash scripts/restore.sh — Then restore: docker compose exec backend bash scripts/restore.sh <timestamp>

howToResetAdmin.q: How do I reset the admin account?
howToResetAdmin.a: Run the seed script: docker compose exec backend node scripts/seed.js — This creates the default admin user (admin/admin) if it doesn't exist. Change the password immediately after.

howToEnable2FA.q: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
howToEnable2FA.a: Go to Settings, find the Security section, and click 'Setup 2FA'. Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator or any TOTP app, then enter the verification code to activate.
